headline: Can Starbucks Turn Delivery Momentum Into Durable U.S. Comp Growth?
summary: SBUX is leaning on delivery growth to support U.S. comps as rising transactions and broader access test the Back to Starbucks strategy.

headline: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Starbucks Corporation (SBUX) is a Trending Stock
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
